element.name: StoreOS POS
element.documentation: In-store point of sale terminals and kiosks

element.name: Promo Manager
element.documentation: Pricing rules, promotions, and coupon management

element.name: Product Information Manager
element.documentation: Product catalog, attributes, images, and taxonomy

element.name: Inventory Service
element.documentation: Real-time inventory positions across all channels

element.name: Payment Gateway
element.documentation: Card authorization, tokenization, and fraud screening

element.name: Supplier Logistics Hub
element.documentation: Inbound logistics, ASN tracking, dock scheduling

element.name: RxManager
element.documentation: Pet prescription management and pharmacy integration

element.name: StoreOps Dashboard
element.documentation: Store performance, staffing, and task management

element.name: Legacy Reporting DB
element.documentation: Oracle-based reporting database (being migrated to EDW)

relationship.name: Order-to-Cash Flow: PawsPlus.com -> Order Management System
Order-to-Cash Flow: Order Management System -> Inventory Service
Order-to-Cash Flow: Order Management System -> Payment Gateway
Order-to-Cash Flow: Order Management System -> Warehouse Management System
Order-to-Cash Flow: Payment Gateway -> Settlement Engine
Order-to-Cash Flow: Settlement Engine -> SAP ERP
Customer 360 Sync: Customer Hub -> Enterprise Data Warehouse
Inventory Replenishment Cycle: Warehouse Management System -> Inventory Service
Inventory Replenishment Cycle: Inventory Service -> Demand Planner
Inventory Replenishment Cycle: Demand Planner -> SAP ERP
Inventory Replenishment Cycle: SAP ERP -> Vendor Portal
Subscription Autoship Pipeline: PawsCare+ Platform -> Payment Gateway
Subscription Autoship Pipeline: PawsCare+ Platform -> Order Management System
Subscription Autoship Pipeline: Order Management System -> Warehouse Management System
